subject: Re: WarpTools and AMD GPUs
body:
Hi Juha,
It’s not impossible in principle but the work required to make it happen hasn’t been done and isn’t planned.
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Dec 4, 2024, at 22:31, Juha Huiskonen <juha.huiskonen@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Dear all,
Is it possible to run WarpTools and MCore using AMD GPUs.  Specifically 
AMD MI250x? 
Cheers,
Juha
